name: patent-drawing-pipeline
description: Full patent drawing pipeline: extract figures from spec, generate claim-aligned Mermaid diagrams, render to PNG/SVG, align reference numerals across claims/spec/drawings, generate Detailed Description of Drawings section, and produce filing checklist. Feed it a patent family and get back everything needed for filing.

config.instruction: Read the patent Specification.md, Provisional.md, and Claims.md files. Extract: (1) EVERY figure description (FIG. 1 through FIG. N) with drawing_type_hint, (2) ALL key terms from independent claims (component names, module names, interfaces), (3) The patent family name and total figure count. Output structured data for downstream steps.

For EACH figure, generate a patent drawing using EXACT claim terminology for all reference numeral labels. Every component label must match the term used in the claims. Produce: mermaid_code, reference_numerals table, compliance_notes. Reference numerals use 100-series for FIG.1, 200-series for FIG.2, etc.

Using the claims text, specification text, and generated drawings, build a cross-reference table mapping every claim term to its reference numeral and figure. Generate a complete 'Detailed Description of the Drawings' section with inline reference numerals (e.g., 'the expectation interface (100)'). Generate updated 'Brief Description of the Drawings' section. Flag any consistency violations between claims, spec, and drawings.

Build a patent filing checklist covering: (1) All figures generated and rendered to PNG/SVG, (2) Reference numerals consistent across claims, spec, and drawings, (3) Detailed Description of Drawings section complete, (4) Brief Description of Drawings updated, (5) USPTO 37 CFR 1.84 compliance for each figure, (6) No consistency violations between documents, (7) Steps to finalize and file. Set deadline to 2 weeks from now.
